'''Trennt Ferinn''' was a [[Colonel/Legends|colonel]] who served in the [[New Republic Intelligence Service]].

A member of the [[Analysis Bureau (New Republic Intelligence)|Analysis Bureau]], Ferinn was attached to the [[Special Threats Division]]. Ferinn was responsible for compiling a report on the events surrounding the [[Corellian Crisis]].
